gaps: No existing test case covers Transparency mode settings or any sub-setting (Environment/Speech) functionality.
No test case validates saving/persisting user selections when switching between sub-settings.
No test case covers the specific sub-setting values mentioned (Surround 85, Free 60, Free 20).
All existing test cases focus on onboarding, EULA, splash screen, and location permissions — none relate to audio/transparency mode settings.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TRANSPARENCY-001: Verify Transparency Mode sub-settings Environment and Speech are accessible
steps: 1. Launch the application and complete onboarding (if applicable).
2. Navigate to the main settings menu.
3. Locate and tap on 'Transparency Mode' settings option.
4. Verify that the Transparency Mode settings screen is displayed.
7. Verify the Environment settings panel is displayed.
9. Verify the Speech settings panel is displayed.
generated_testcases.expected: Both 'Environment' and 'Speech' sub-settings are accessible and display their respective settings panels when selected.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TRANSPARENCY-002: Verify user can set Environment sub-setting to Surround 85 and it persists
steps: 1. Launch the application and navigate to Transparency Mode settings.
3. Locate the slider or control for 'Surround' level.
5. Tap on 'Speech' sub-setting to switch away.
generated_testcases.expected: The Surround level remains at 85 after switching to Speech and back to Environment. The value is persisted and not reverted to default.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TRANSPARENCY-003: Verify user can set Speech sub-setting to Free 60 and it persists
steps: 1. Launch the application and navigate to Transparency Mode settings.
3. Locate the slider or control for 'Free' level.
5. Tap on 'Environment' sub-setting to switch away.
generated_testcases.expected: The Free level remains at 60 after switching to Environment and back to Speech. The value is persisted and not reverted to default.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TRANSPARENCY-004: Verify user can set Speech sub-setting to Free 20 and it persists
steps: 1. Launch the application and navigate to Transparency Mode settings.
3. Locate the slider or control for 'Free' level.
5. Tap on 'Environment' sub-setting to switch away.
generated_testcases.expected: The Free level remains at 20 after switching to Environment and back to Speech. The value is persisted and not reverted to default.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TRANSPARENCY-005: Verify multiple sub-settings persist simultaneously after switching
steps: 1. Launch the application and navigate to Transparency Mode settings.
generated_testcases.expected: Both Environment (Surround 85) and Speech (Free 60) values persist independently after switching between sub-settings multiple times.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TRANSPARENCY-006: Verify sub-settings revert to defaults when switching (negative test to reproduce bug)
steps: 1. Launch the application and navigate to Transparency Mode settings.
5. Note the default value of Free level (e.g., default value).
generated_testcases.expected: BUG REPRODUCTION: If the bug is present, the Surround level reverts to its default value (not 85) and/or the Free level reverts to its default value (not 60) after switching between sub-settings. Expected correct behavior: both values should remain as set by the user.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TRANSPARENCY-007: Verify sub-setting values persist after app restart
steps: 1. Launch the application and navigate to Transparency Mode settings.
7. Re-launch the application and complete any necessary re-login.
9. Tap on 'Environment' sub-setting and verify Surround level.
10. Tap on 'Speech' sub-setting and verify Free level.
generated_testcases.expected: After app restart, the Environment Surround level is still 85 and the Speech Free level is still 60. Settings persist across app sessions.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TRANSPARENCY-008: Verify sub-setting values persist after switching multiple times rapidly
steps: 1. Launch the application and navigate to Transparency Mode settings.
2. Tap on 'Environment' sub-setting and set Surround to 85.
3. Tap on 'Speech' sub-setting and set Free to 60.
4. Rapidly switch between Environment and Speech tabs 5 times.
generated_testcases.expected: Both sub-setting values persist correctly even after rapid switching between Environment and Speech tabs.
